Headline: Software Engineer | Power Platform (Lead) • Full-Stack (React, Next.js, .NET, Node) • AI-assisted dev (Cursor, Copilot, Claude)
Summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience delivering secure, scalable solutions across the Microsoft Power Platform and full-stack environments (React, Angular, Next.js, NestJS, .NET, Node.js). Trusted as the Power Platform team lead on a federal program (NIH/NHLBI), owning governance, ALM, and developer enablement. Skilled in leveraging AI-enabled development practices with Cursor IDE, GitHub Copilot, and Claude to accelerate delivery and improve code quality. Delivered 30–50% cycle-time reductions, avoided $50K–$200K in annual licensing, and led a zero-downtime migration for 200+ users.
